Built for Generations

Now you won't have to go down to get some fresh air. With well-ventilated spaces, let your hair down and feel the breeze — right at home.

Welcome to Raghav Reserve

Rediscover Living

Enjoy a quiet evening with the family. Take walks without cars honking at you. Go to family dinners without going too far. Every corner has been thoughtfully designed so you can live your best moments.

The Transformation

Chikhali's New Landmark

Tucked into a peaceful corner of Chikhali in north Pune, just minutes from the business hubs of Chakan and Talwade — yet far enough to leave the city's hustle behind. RAGHAV RESERVE stands at the centre of this growth, where architecture, landscape and craftsmanship come together in quiet dialogue.

Generously-proportioned 2 & 3 BHK residences embody the idea of a home held apart from the noise. Designed by ARK Reza Kabul Architects — every home is oriented for light and cross-ventilation, with expansive balconies and 60,000+ sq.ft. of curated amenities.

Vertical Masterplan

  • 3rd Floor: E-Deck — Grand Amenities Floor
  • 4th – 16th Floor: 2 & 3 BHK Residences
Spacious Interiors

It's called a living room for a reason.

Don't think twice about living freely. It's your home, after all. Host parties. Bring the gang together for match screenings. Do it all with rooms spacious enough to fit all your plans.

Residential Segment

Actual 3 BHKs. Not 'Adjusted' 3 BHKs.

Six configurations across Wing A and Wing B — from the efficient 2 BHK Supreme to the expansive 3 BHK Royale. Every home built with Aluminium Formwork Technology.

Bed and room.

A bedroom that can have both. Do your stretches. Soak in some sun. Move around as you please.

A nursery. A chai spot. Both.

Forget cramped balconies. Our expansive balconies make space for all your hobbies.

Premium Kitchens

No such thing as too many cooks.

Cooking for the family has always been a joy. Now with our spacious kitchens, cooking with them will be too. Generous counters, dry area, and room for everyone to join in.

The Lifestyle

60,000+ Sq.Ft. of Amenities

You wanted it all. Now you have it all. When everything you need is close by, your time isn't wasted getting there — it's yours to spend the way you want.

E-Deck Amenities

Swimming pool, state-of-the-art gym, landscaped garden, and a dedicated kids play area — all on your doorstep.

Terrace Amenities

Reading room, jogging track, herbal garden, multipurpose court, yoga deck, net cricket and more across the upper level.

Commercial Segment

Premium Street Shopping

Location

The Centre of Growth

Tucked into a peaceful corner of Chikhali in north Pune, just minutes from Chakan and Talwade business hubs — yet far enough to leave the city's hustle behind. It's a place where you can escape the world while staying connected to it.
